flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The King's University are 23% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.5k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The King's University fell 47% between 2021 and 2024 (12.5% → 6.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The King's University rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.4k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The King's University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (298 → 251).
